title: pelargonium × obliquum
intro: Pelargonium × obliquum, also known as the Red Form of Mountain Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as linalool and geraniol, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × obliquum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
